meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: "Bohnen-Gemüse-Ragout mit Zartweizen "
meal.note: Bean and vegetable ragout with tender wheat

meal.name: Königsberger Klopse mit Risi Bisi, Brokkolie und veganem Brewbites Ragout
meal.note: Königsberg-style meatballs with risi e bisi, broccoli, and vegan Brew Bites ragout

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: Springroll, with rice and Sweet chili- Sauce
meal.note: Swabian-style lentils with vegan Spätzle and smoked tofu

meal.name: Spaghetti Carbonara, Karottengemüse, Zweierlei Pastasaucen vegetarisch und Vegan, Zuchini Flatbread
meal.note: Spaghetti Carbonara, carrot dish, two types of pasta sauce (vegetarian and vegan), zucchini flatbread

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: Gefüllte Flammkuchenrolle, mit Beilagensalat
meal.note: Spring roll with sweet chili sauce and long grain rice

meal.name: Geschnetzeltes vom Hohenloher Landschwein mit Schupfnudeln, Linsengemüse Champigniongemüsepfanne
meal.note: Szeged-style sliced meat ragout with Spätzle, lentil vegetables, and roasted root vegetables.

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: "Gekräutertes Pilzragout mit Serviettenknödel "
meal.note: Herb-infused mushroom ragout with napkin dumpling

meal.name: Pulled Beef mit gesmoketen Süßkartoffel, Maiskolben, und Tortellini Alla Panna vegan
meal.note: Pulled beef with smoked sweet potato, corn on the cob, and vegan tortellini alla panna.

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: Serbische Reispfanne mit Sonnenblumen-Hack und Tzatziki
meal.note: Serbian-style rice skillet with sunflower-based mince and tzatziki

meal.name: Fisch and chips mit Winegar, Pommes , Shepherds Pie
meal.note: Fish and chips with vinegar, fries, shepherd's pie

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: "Hausgemachte Pasta in cremiger Zucchini-Fetasoße "
meal.note: Homemade pasta in a creamy zucchini-feta sauce

meal.name: Linsen mit Spätzle und Saitenwürstle , Veganes Gemüsegulasch mit Reis
meal.note: Lentils with Spätzle and sausages, vegan vegetable goulash with rice

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: Linsen-Köfte mit Orientalischem Rahmspinat und Kartoffelstampf
meal.note: Lentil kofta with oriental creamed spinach and mashed potatoes

meal.name: Gedämpfter Seelachs mit Kartöffele, Sontheimer Gemüseselektion und einer Komposition aus Hirse und Dinkel
meal.note: Steamed pollock with potatoes, a selection of Sontheim vegetables, and a blend of millet and spelt.

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: "Vegane Champignonpfanne süß-sauer mit Reis "
meal.note: Vegan sweet and sour mushroom stir-fry with rice

meal.name: Schweinehaxen, mit Kartoffelknödel Bayrisch Kraut und Linsenkartoffelpfanne
meal.note: Roasted pork knuckle with potato dumplings, Bavarian-style cabbage, and a lentil-potato skillet.

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: "Dicke weiße Bohnen mit Tomaten auf Tortillachips und Sour Cream "
meal.note: Thick white beans with tomatoes on tortilla chips and sour cream

meal.name: Bratwurst mit Kartoffelstampf , Bunte Pastavariation
meal.note: Fried sausage with mashed potatoes, assorted pasta medley

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: "Tortellini mit cremiger Gorgonzolasoße und Schnittlauch "
meal.note: Tortellini with creamy Gorgonzola sauce and chives

meal.name: Heute ist der Letzte Öffnungstag der Mensa.
meal.note: Today is the last day the Mensa is open.
